initiatives.name: Black Queer & Intersectional Collective (BQIC)
initiatives.description: BQIC is a grassroots community organization in Central Ohio that works towards the liberation of Black LGBTQIA+ people from all walks of life through direct action, community organizing, education on our issues, and creating spaces to uplift our voices.

initiatives.name: Mutual Aid Street Solidarity (MASS)
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid and community care through direct support initiatives in Columbus. They coordinate resource distribution, solidarity networks, and street outreach while building power through neighborhood organizing and creating spaces for collective support and resistance.

initiatives.name: FNB Produce Serves Central OH
initiatives.description: Distroing free food to our neighbors! Interested in getting involved? Send us a DM!

initiatives.name: Stop the Sweeps 614
initiatives.description: Media outlet covering camp evictions and housing injustice

initiatives.name: Central Ohio Mesh
initiatives.description: Welcome to Central Ohio Mesh, the Meshtastic local group for the Columbus, Ohio metro area.

initiatives.name: Columbus Diaper Coalition
initiatives.description: Providing free diapers to families facing financial hardship via partner agency distribution.

initiatives.name: Columbus DSA
initiatives.description: As a political activist group, we work on the local and national levels to create a more equitable society for all.

initiatives.name: Columbus Safety Collective
initiatives.description: The Columbus Safety Collective exists to create an anti-racist, health centered, nonpolice emergency response program for the city of Columbus.

initiatives.name: Columbus Food Fescue
initiatives.description: Fighting food insecurity and waste in Columbus, OH. Sign up as a volunteer, donor, or receiving agency—and help us fill plates, not landfills!

initiatives.name: Black Men Build Columbus
initiatives.description: Copowering and organizing Black Men to build POWER alongside all Black People.

initiatives.name: First Collective 614
initiatives.description: We provide necessary and emergency aid, support, and supplies to our unsheltered neighbors through direct camp and street outreach.
